x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for Virtual Agent (Creator) enables AI-generated topic suggestions and NLU enhancements for custom applications built in App Engine. Without this, AI-powered conversational experiences cannot be generated for custom apps.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Now Assist for Virtual Agent (Creator) Installed
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Install Now Assist for Virtual Agent from the ServiceNow Store.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: Now Assist for Virtual Agent (Creator) Installed
